teaser: Billionaire investor Mark Cuban used OpenAI's ChatGPT to analyze the first presidential debate between Joe Biden and Donald Trump. The AI highlights Biden's empathy and experience but critiques his clarity while noting Trump's assertiveness and leadership but pointing out his tendency to overstate and avoid specifics.
teaserText: Billionaire investor Mark Cuban used OpenAI's ChatGPT to analyze the first presidential debate between Joe Biden and Donald Trump. title: Mark Cuban Asked ChatGPT To Analyze First Trump-Biden Debate And Judge The Duo's Communication Skills, Professionalism — Here Is What The Bot Said
